# TASK-NNN Evidence Pack

## Scope
Milestone, approved task/milestone plan, release horizon, and creator decisions used.

## Environment
Commit, branch/worktree, OS, engine/editor revision, dependency lock hash, reference-hardware ID.

## Required results
- Build: PASS / FAIL / N/A - command and artifact
- Tests: PASS / FAIL / N/A - command and report
- Replay/state diff: PASS / FAIL / N/A - scenario and checksum
- Persistence/migration: PASS / FAIL / N/A - fixture and result
- Performance: PASS / FAIL / N/A - scenario, p50/p95/max, allocations, memory
- Documentation: PASS / FAIL - changed contracts/specs/ADRs
- Independent review: PASS / CHANGES REQUIRED - reviewer and report
- Creator acceptance: PASS / REJECTED / PENDING - acceptance file

## Decision audit
- Decisions opened:
- Decisions explicitly deferred:
- Assumptions that remain provisional:

## Changed files

## Known limitations and deferred work

## Rollback

## Final declaration
This task remains open until every required line is PASS or justified N/A, independent review passes, creator acceptance passes, and no unopened product decision was silently made.
